calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Discover Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Henry Lee.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Robert Atkins, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Pricipal $8,614.99
Prejudgment Interest $981.76
Costs $201.30
Attorney's Fees $800.00, for a Total of $10,598.05
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2005 Set For Trial On Feb-21-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
